releaseNotes: Safe follow-up to 10.3.17 from the restored 10.3.11 OAuth Protocol Callback + Recovery line.
Keeps Remember signed in behavior: a remembered account opens directly to the clinic user/passcode step on fresh app open, lock, or logout.
Fixes Back behavior: after pressing Back from clinic passcode, Inventra stays on email/password and will not auto-jump forward until the correct account password is confirmed again.
Keeps typed email/password fields stable when switching authentication views; no sudden clearing or view jumping.
No SQL, no data deletion, and no changes to products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, users, Supabase tables, updater branding, or icon assets.
